title: taraxacum catenatum
intro: Taraxacum catenatum, also known as the alpine dandelion, is a species of flowering plant that belongs to the dandelion family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, as well as its ability to support liver and kidney function. The health benefits of Taraxacum catenatum include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve digestion, as well as its ability to support the immune system and reduce oxidative stress. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and roots are typically dried and used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal properties.
